title: Opening Ceremony
description: Welcome to Iridescence – the 77th Eastercon! Join us as we officially open the convention with our Guests of Honour: R. J. Barker, Emma Newman, Karen Lord, and fan guests Serena Culfeather and John Wilson.

title: SFF and Trans History
description: A discussion of the history of trans people and science fiction and fantasy, and how these genres have challenged contemporary ideas of gender through both creators and works. Panelists: Sandra Bond, Nick Hubble, Joel Cornah, duckbunny, and Cheryl Morgan.

title: Book Launch: Wizard's Tower Press
description: Wizard's Tower Press presents their latest titles. Join the authors for readings, discussion and book signing. Featuring Cheryl Morgan and Juliet E. McKenna.

title: Obsidian Book Launch
description: Join us for the launch of Obsidian, with readings and refreshments.

title: Considering Anne McCaffrey
description: A panel looking back at the works and legacy of Anne McCaffrey, her contributions to science fiction and fantasy, and what her Pern and other series mean to readers today. Featuring Juliet E. McKenna.

title: Fanzines in the 21st Century
description: Exploring the creation, sharing, and enduring appeal of fanzines in the age of microblogging and BookTok. How are fanzines made and what challenges do they face today? Panelists: Alison Scott, Roseanna Pendlebury, Sandra Bond, Tommy Ferguson, and Cheryl Morgan.

title: Appropriation of Greek Culture in the Anglophone World, and How to Reclaim It
description: An exploration of how Greek myths, philosophy and culture have been adopted and adapted in the English-speaking world, and what it means to reclaim these narratives. Featuring Juliet E. McKenna.

title: Introduction to Fantasy Kingdoms
description: A beginner-friendly panel about building and exploring fantasy kingdoms in fiction. How do authors create convincing secondary world polities? Featuring Juliet E. McKenna.

title: My Flesh is False – SF Poetry Show
description: Andrew Wallace presents sci-fi poetry from his new collection 'A.D.H.DAYS'. A live performance exploring science fiction themes through verse.

title: Disco
description: The Saturday night disco, a beloved Eastercon tradition. DJ set by Mike Brooks.

title: Author Reading: Scott Edelman, Emily Tesh and Wole Talabi
description: Readings from Scott Edelman, Emily Tesh and Wole Talabi. Come hear excerpts from their latest and forthcoming works.

title: Why Writing and Making Tactile Art is Revolutionary
description: A discussion on the importance of tactile, hands-on creativity in a digital age — why writing by hand and making physical art still matters. Panelists: Scott Edelman, Tiffani Angus, Aliette de Bodard, Nikita Andester, and Penny Hill.

title: Writing about Darkness in an Ever Darkening World
description: How do authors write dark fiction when the real world keeps getting darker? A panel on the responsibilities and freedoms of writing about difficult themes. Panelists: Scott Edelman, David Ketelby, Emily Inkpen, Justin Lee Anderson, and Anna Smith Spark.

title: BSFA Awards Ceremony
description: The presentation of the British Science Fiction Association Awards for the best works published in 2025. Categories include Best Novel, Best Shorter Fiction, Best Artwork, Best Non-Fiction and Best Audio Fiction. Hosted by Stewart Hotston.

title: Author Reading III: Aliette de Bodard, Robin CM Duncan and Juliet E. McKenna
description: Readings from Aliette de Bodard, Robin CM Duncan and Juliet E. McKenna. Hear previews of forthcoming works and favourites from their catalogues.

title: The Joy of Podcasts
description: A celebration of genre podcasts — from fiction podcasts to review shows, interview series and beyond. Panelists: Scott Edelman, Michael Ireland, Robin C.M. Duncan, Kat Kourbeti, and Devin Martin.

title: Folklore, Cultures, and the Modern Fantastic: Adapting Myth
description: How writers and artists have used and misused folklores and myths. Discussing good and bad practices in adapting myth for modern creative works. Panelists: Kat Kourbeti, M E Moirin, Johannes T Evans, Charles Stross, and Cheryl Morgan.

title: Closing Ceremony
description: Join us to wrap up Iridescence, the 77th Eastercon. Highlights, thanks, and the traditional handover to next year's convention.
